title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at iGate India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at iGate India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at iGate India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About iGate India:
iGate India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India!
